title: In Hungary, MAGA ally Orban trails in polls and awaits visit by JD Vance
summary_full: Viktor Orban, who has built strong ties to the MAGA movement, faces a tough electoral challenge from center-right candidate Peter Magyar on April 12.
summary_public: Viktor Orban, who has built strong ties to the MAGA movement, faces a tough electoral challenge from center-right candidate Peter Magyar on April 12.

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Orban trails in polls and awaits visit by JD Vance
